status: Resolved - paired sample collected; promotion remains disabled by policy
finding: ATM-GOV-0153 requires at least one real paired single-Agent versus Team Agents dogfood sample with provider billable usage, model identities, pricing catalog version, wall-clock time, and quality outcome. On 2026-07-16, a live OpenAI Responses paired sample was collected and the artifact moved to measurementStatus complete.
expectedBehavior: Team Agents promotion must stay disabled until a real paired sample records provider billable usage, model identities, pricing catalog version, wall-clock metrics, and quality outcome. Fixture or simulated numbers may remain diagnostic only and must keep promotionEligible false.
evidenceOrRepro: artifacts/generated/team-dogfood/real-paired-sample.json records sampleKind live-paired-run, measurementStatus complete, providerBillableUsage true, pricingEvidenceKind provider-bill, wall-clock values, model identities, redacted secret refs, baseline/team token usage, and missingEvidence [].
followUp: Keep promotionEligible false until a separate rollout decision approves Team as the default. Continue running node --strip-types tests/cli/team-agents-dogfood.test.ts and node --strip-types tests/cli/governance-cost-bench.test.ts when the paired sample contract changes.
